# Manut

> Manut (manut.xyz) is an AI cloud workspace: docs, databases, whiteboards, and a multi-model AI agent. Built in the open, hosted by us — start free in 30 seconds.

## What is Manut?

Manut is a team workspace that combines notes, project databases, infinite whiteboards, and an AI agent with Read, Edit, and Full Agent modes. It is a friendly fork of AFFiNE with extra AI routing (Gemini, Claude, Llama on Vertex), calendar integrations, and unlimited workspace members on the Free tier.

## Who is Manut for?

Students, startups, and product teams who want Notion-class docs plus real AI automation without per-seat lock-in. Works in the browser — sign up at app.manut.xyz.

## Pricing

- Free: $0, unlimited members, 2 GB storage, $5 of AI usage per month, all editor features
- Pro: $20 / user / month, 100 GB storage, $50 of AI usage per month, premium routing, SSO
- Enterprise: custom, SAML/SCIM, audit logs

## Key facts

- Website: https://manut.xyz
- Sign up: https://app.manut.xyz
- Source: https://github.com/gogocash-deploy/manut
- Support: hello@manut.xyz
- Offline: yes (CRDT sync)
- AI models: Gemini 2.5, Claude, Llama via Google Vertex
- Export: Markdown, JSON, HTML — your data is yours

## Compare

Manut vs Notion: multi-model AI agent with explicit permission modes (Read / Edit / Full Agent), infinite whiteboards built in, unlimited members on the Free tier.
Manut vs AFFiNE: same core editor; Manut adds Manut-specific AI tools, calendar, and cloud hosting at manut.xyz.
